# Coinbase Exchange recorded fixtures

These deterministic responses follow the public Coinbase Exchange schemas reviewed on
2026-07-14: [products](https://docs.cdp.coinbase.com/api-reference/exchange-api/rest-api/products/get-all-known-trading-pairs)
and the aggregated [product book](https://docs.cdp.coinbase.com/api-reference/exchange-api/rest-api/products/get-product-book).
No Advanced Trade JWT, API key or private endpoint is represented.

USD and USDC are deliberately separate fixture identities. Prices and timestamps are frozen test
values, not trading recommendations or readiness evidence.
